name: IAM Users Have Single Active Access Key
description: IAM users should have at most one active access key. Having multiple active access keys increases the risk of credential exposure
remediation: Deactivate or delete extra access keys for IAM users, keeping only one active key per user
remediation_steps: List access keys: aws iam list-access-keys --user-name <username>
Identify which key is actively used
Deactivate unused keys: aws iam update-access-key --user-name <username> --access-key-id <key-id> --status Inactive
After confirming the inactive key is not needed, delete it: aws iam delete-access-key --user-name <username> --access-key-id <key-id>
